stemHtml:
An aerodrome makes routine weather reports once per hour. The most recent METAR reads as this:

131020Z 15005KT CAVOK 18/14 Q1010 NOSIG

At 10:45 UTC, the prevailing visibility is observed to have been 3000 m in smoke for the last 10 minutes. In accordance with ICAO Annex 3, which of the following actions should the aerodrome meteorological office take?

options.a: Take no immediate action before the next METAR in 35 minutes time.
options.b: Issue an amendment (AMD) to the previous METAR.
options.c: Issue a SPECI stating the revised visibility only.
options.d: Issue a SPECI with all the most recent conditions, including the most recent visibility.
